title: feat(apps): add Pigment, PseudoWrite, Tawer_bot, JFOAC to showcase
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Four new apps bloom
gist.blurb: Four incredible new community apps just landed in the showcase, from AI art generators to a Telegram bot with over 5,000 users. Huge shoutout to @SmokePigDad and @tawerrd for building such cool tools!
gist.summary: Added Pigment, PseudoWrite, Tawer_bot, and JFOAC to the official community showcase.
gist.impact: Highlights new community creations, giving visibility to developers @SmokePigDad and @tawerrd while providing users with fresh AI tools to explore.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a curator, hanging up four new pieces of art/posters on a cozy wooden bulletin board to represent the four new community apps.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, hanging four new colorful pixel-art posters on a wooden bulletin board in a warm garden shed. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
